component.name: PowerSched
component.summary: CPU frequency scaling and sched_ext scheduler control center

description.p: PowerSched is a GTK4/libadwaita application that combines what cpupower-gui and scx-manager do in a single window.

ul.li: Lists installed scx_* schedulers with descriptions
Shows the active scheduler and starts/stops them
Profile presets: Gaming, Low Latency, Power Save, Server

description.p: Privileged changes go through a small, input-validating root helper invoked via pkexec (polkit). On systems with scx.service the scheduler choice is persisted through systemd.
First packaged release with Arch, Debian/Ubuntu and Fedora packaging.
